name: Cream Cheese Frosting
directions: Beat cream cheese and butter together until smooth.
Add sugar and vanilla and blend well.
Fold in nuts.
Spread on cooled cake.
Should be enough to spread between layers if a 2 layer cake is made.

similar.name: No Sifting Vanilla Cream Cheese Frosting

name: Season's Best Frosting Ever!!
directions: Whip together the melted butter, powdered sugar and vanilla. Add the heavy cream slowly until you have reached the desired consistency. Make sure this is whipped smooth. Enjoy.

name: No Sifting Vanilla Cream Cheese Frosting
directions: Beat together the cream cheese, butter,  sour cream, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
Gradually beat in the box of powdered sugar on medium speed until smooth.
Generously frosts 30 cupcakes.

name: White Bakery Icing
directions: Beat egg white with mixer until stiff.
Add vegetable shortening, (or 1/2 shortening, 1/2 butter). ( I have made it both ways both turn out good) vanilla, and almond extract. Mix by hand.
Cream together then add powdered sugar gradually to creamed mixture.
Add 2-3 tablespoons of milk or enough to make it desired icing consistency.

name: Cream Cheese Frosting
directions: Have butter and cream cheese at room temperature.
Add vanilla and cream together.
Stir in sugar.
Add milk (use more or less based on preference) to desired consistency.

similar.name: No Sifting Vanilla Cream Cheese Frosting

name: Professional Cream Cheese Buttercream Frosting
directions: In a large bowl (or KA Mixer) cream together shortening and butter.
Stop and scrape down, start again till creamy.
Add cut-up cream cheese and cream again, scraping down sides till fluffy on high.
Add vanilla extract and blend.
Add at time confectioner's sugar, starting on low speed as to not spray sugar all over, then increase speed till blended each time and scrape down each time.
You may add salt if you need to.
Turn on high speed for 15 minutes to make frosting blended, smooth and fluffy.
Also you may have to chill frosting after completed.

similar.name: No Sifting Vanilla Cream Cheese Frosting

name: Creamy Chocolate Frosting II
directions: In a medium saucepan, melt the butter and chocolate over low heat.
Stir constantly until melted and well blended.
Add the vanilla and sugar.
Beat with an electric mixer.
Add water gradually as you beat until it is a spreadable consistency.

name: Vanilla Frosting
directions: In a small saucepan slowly whisk the flour into the milk and heat, stirring constantly until thick. Allow to cool to room temperature.
While it's cooling cream the softened butter and the sugar together until it is light and fluffy.
Stir Vanilla into cooled milk/flour mixture then add to the butter/sugar mixture and beat until combined and it resembles whipped cream.
Use immediately or you will have to rewhip if it starts to separate.

name: Buttery Cream Cheese Frosting
directions: *NOTE*:  In Vita Mixer or other style cutting blender, put the raw sugar in and run on high until all raw sugar has turned to powder.  You may have to do this in small portions depending on unit you use.
In large mixing bowl put cream cheese, raw powder sugar and extracts and mix well.
With a spatula or pastry spreading knife, spread evenly over single cake surface.

name: Ultimate Butter Cream Frosting
directions: Cream powdered sugar, butter, vanilla, and salt.  While mixer is running, slowly add a portion of the cream to the mixture.  Continue adding the cream to make the frosting of a good spreading consistency.  You may need a little less or a little more of the cream called out in the recipe to achieve your desired consistency.

similar.name: No Sifting Vanilla Cream Cheese Frosting

name: Fluffy Cream Cheese Frosting
directions: Whip cream with a mixer until soft peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix cream cheese, honey and vanilla until creamy.
Fold cream cheese mixture into whipped cream.

name: Classic Buttercream Frosting
directions: Assemble your ingredients making sure they are room temperature. I suggest setting out the butter and cream the night before.
Assemble your utensils. You will need one large mixing bowl, a set of measuring spoons, dry measuring cup, liquid measuring cup, soft spatula, a standard hand mixer.
With your hand mixer beat butter in a large bowl on high speed until creamy.
Add heavy cream and extracts (or liqueurs if desired). Beat on high for five minutes.
Add powdered sugar one cup at a time, beating on high until light and fluffy. Scrape the sides of the bowl to ensure an even incorporation of all the sugar. .
Your end product should be light and airy.
Frost your favorite cake, cookie, or fill your favorite doughnut or pastry.

FOR MOCHA OR CHOCOLATE:  Substitute 1.5 cups of powdered instant coffee of your choice, or powdered cocoa in place of 1/2 cup of powdered sugar. I use Hershey’s or Ghiradelli. Both work beautifully. You may also add a coffee or chocolate liqueur, both which are fantastic. Again, this recipe is very versatile. If you want a stronger and richer coffee or chocolate, you can add more powders or liqueurs to taste. Texture may vary slightly with additional ingredients. Use your discretion.

similar.name: No Sifting Vanilla Cream Cheese Frosting
